---
title: "logic.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/calculus/logic.ts"
loc: 7
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.85
style_score: 9.35
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 9.40
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `calculateLogicScore`
- `calculateLogicScore`
- `complexityScore`
- `nestingScore`
- `rawScore`
